title: GitLost: We Tricked GitHub's AI Agent into Leaking Private Repos
author: ColinEberhardt
raw_description: Article URL: https://noma.security/blog/gitlost-how-we-tricked-githubs-ai-agent-into-leaking-private-repos/ Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48827858 Points: 521 # Comments: 196
summary: 文章揭示了如何通过提示注入攻击，诱骗GitHub的AI助手泄露私有仓库内容，展示了AI安全漏洞的严重性。
analysis_note: 技术深度高，揭示了AI Agent的安全风险，对工程师有重要警示价值。
